home2.powerlifting: I have been doing powerlifting for more than 10 years already.
home2.trainer: I work as a professional trainer as well. And I can help you increase your results either in powerlifting or bench press. Also, I can help you achieve your fitness goals.
home2.achievements: So, if you want to be at a higher level than you are, you should work with me.

projects.onlineTrainingDescription: I send you a training plan and a diet every week. You should make a video your main sets and give me feedback. You can keep in touch with me every day around the clock.
